description: Generic SQL-touching projects (detected via any *.sql file). Also serves as DB/'s vertical base for any future sibling template.

skills.name: postgres
skills.description: PlanetScale postgres skill (company-backed, MIT, plain-text/local) - PostgreSQL JUDGMENT that docs/LSP don't give: reading EXPLAIN / EXPLAIN ANALYZE, index-type choice (B-tree/GIN/GiST/BRIN), unused/duplicate-index audit, partitioning, query anti-patterns, VACUUM/bloat/xid-wraparound. Progressive-disclosure (lean SKILL.md + references/). NOT redundant with Context7 (docs) or the thin dual-dialect sql.md rule. PostgreSQL-SPECIFIC - skip for Oracle-only projects (Oracle tuning lives in rules/sql.md). Cherry-picked via --skill; verify the slug at install.

install.cmd: npx skills add planetscale/database-skills --skill postgres --agent claude-code

_notes: No generic database plugin exists in the official catalog for any RDBMS - see README.md's 'Related tools' section for MCP-server alternatives.
Oracle query-tuning has no trustworthy Agent Skill (the one that existed is deprecated + OCI-ops-focused) - that judgment is kept in rules/sql.md instead.
